subtitle.text: The bees were farming before we were. We just learned to work next to them.

description: CH.04 · THE APIARY
▸ The mead chain begins with the bees.
Not the barrel. The bees.
Without a honey supply, mead production stalls.
Build an apiary. Keep it flowering.
◈ BEE + HONEY SYSTEM
└ Beehive: place near 2+ flowers — bees auto-work
└ Campfire beneath hive: smoke = calm bees
(harvest without angering them)
└ Honey Bottle: collected from full hive
removes Poison effect when consumed
└ Honeycomb: harvested with shears from full hive
used in waxing copper, crafting honeycomb blocks,
and as input for H&H Cask mead fermentation
◈ MEADOW MOD SYNERGY
└ Meadow biomes have dense flower coverage
└ Bees in meadow biomes collect faster
└ Meadow Cow milk (with Rennett) → cheese
Cheese = Dairy group for Diet coverage
└ Meadow + apiary = the most efficient
dairy + honey production zone
▸ Scale the apiary before scaling the mead production.
The bottles run dry faster than you expect.
▶ Craft/place 2 Beehives
▶ Collect 8 Honey Bottles
▶ Collect 16 Honeycomb
◇ Honey Bottles cure Poison.
Keep a stack. Caves are full of spiders.
They are also the fastest Poison vector in Ch04.
